title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su recommends five foundational best practices for Claude Cowork: keeping root CLAUDE.md lean, structuring MEMORY.md correctly, archiving outdated content, migrating Claude Projects to Cowork workstations, and understanding when to use skills versus workstations. These practices prevent workspace degradation over extended use.
